Text.value: Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 20 mm, , G 1/2, hygienisch, hygienic
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 30 mm, , G 1/2, hygienisch, hygienic
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 50 mm, , G 1/2, hygienisch, hygienic
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 100 mm, , G 1/2, hygienisch, hygienic
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 150 mm, , G 1/2, hygienisch, hygienic
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 1000 mm, , G 1/2, hygienisch, hygienic
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 50 mm, , 1.5'' Tri-Clamp
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 100 mm, , 1.5'' Tri-Clamp
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 100 mm, , Ø 6
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 150 mm, , Ø 6
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 250 mm, , Ø 6
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 350 mm, , Ø 6
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 550 mm, , Ø 6
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 450 mm, , Ø 6
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 50 mm, , 2'' Tri-Clamp
Temperature transmitter with diagnostic output, -10...150 °C, Length 100 mm, , 2'' Tri-Clamp
Plant designation, describes the device functionality
Location designation, identifies the device location
IO-Link 1.1 system test command 240, Event 8DFE appears
IO-Link 1.1 system test command 241, Event 8DFE disappears
IO-Link 1.1 system test command 242, Event 8DFF appears
IO-Link 1.1 system test command 243, Event 8DFF disappears
Command without effect, for internal use only

Date of device installation within the plant or machine. Please note: This parameter will not be restored on device replacement. A new installation date must be written to the device after replacement.
Analogue start point 2 / Temperature. ASP2 shall be below AEP2. Min distance AEP2...ASP2 = 5.00 °C. For details, see operating manual.
Analogue end point 2 / Temperature. AEP2 shall be above ASP2. Min distance AEP2...ASP2 ===> see ASP2. For details, see operating manual.
Calibration check limit: If the difference from temperature to reference temperature exceeds this value, the user will be notified by [OUT 1] going OFF.
Current internal temperature of the device
Counter of the operating hours since delivery
Counts the seconds, the device operated in the assigned temperature bin
Displays the seconds, the device operated from -20...-10°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from -10...0°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 0...10°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 10...20°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 20...30°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 30...40°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 40...50°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 50...60°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 60...70°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 70...80°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 80...90°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 90...100°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 100...110°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 110...120°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 120...130°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 130...140°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 140...150°C
Output polarity for the switching outputs
ID of the BLOB that is currently transferred
Shows a list of the last occured Events. Events generated by simulation are ignored
Temperature delta exceeds calibration check limit
Bit mask for current pending events
Temperature difference exceeds calibration check limit. Device Status = 2 (Out of specification)
Flash sequence active. Device Status = 1 (Maintenance required)
Description of the measurement data channel
Unit code of the measurement data
Current device status, a copy of the parameter [Device Status, Index 36] in the process data channel
Temperature difference exceeds calibration check limit. Device Status = 2 (Out of specification)
The limit is adjustable by parameter CCL
Flash sequence active. Device Status = 1 (Maintenance required)
Event appears by setting index 2 to value 240, Event disappears by setting index 2 to value 241
Event appears by setting index 2 to value 242, Event disappears by setting index 2 to value 243
Displays the seconds, the device operated from -25...-20°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated below -25°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated from 150...-160°C
Displays the seconds, the device operated above 160°C
